name: RBAC Helper
description: Reusable RBAC role extraction logic. Decodes the x-amzn-oidc-data JWT header from ALB to extract Cognito group membership and determine admin/viewer role.

usage.description: Add a 'checkAdminRole' query (type: runJavaScript) to any workflow that requires admin access before write operations. The query decodes the ALB OIDC JWT, extracts cognito:groups, and returns isAdmin status.

conditionalCheck.description: After running checkAdminRole, check the result before executing write operations

actions.message: Insufficient permissions — Admin role required for this operation

notes: ALB sets x-amzn-oidc-data header after OIDC authentication with Cognito
JWT payload contains cognito:groups claim as an array of group names
If header is missing (e.g., local development), user defaults to viewer role
Read operations (GET) do not require role checks — viewer access is sufficient
Write operations (POST, PATCH, DELETE) require fsxn-admins group membership
